landing.sub: Capture your day with one tap and enjoy a lighter commute home.
landing.trust: Home-screen install · Stay signed in · Auto mode by work hours
landing.values_sub: Not a complex tool — a field-ready partner you actually use.
landing.v1_body: Skip long address typing. Capture your location in one tap, shown as a short place name.
landing.v2_body: AM/PM visits are organized automatically. AI turns them into a submission-ready log.
landing.v3_body: Work mode on the clock, warm wrap-up after hours. RoadLog opens the right screen first.
landing.quote: “Thank you for everything you did today.”
landing.emotion_body: RoadLog is more than a recorder.
landing.emotion_body2: It cheers you on as you head home —
landing.final_title: Don’t let paperwork delay your evening.
landing.final_sub: Install on your home screen and let RoadLog guide you from the first tap.
landing.login_link: Already have an account? Log in
create.title: Write driving log
create.sub: Stamp time & place, add mileage, and let AI finish the log.
create.stamp_desc: One tap records the current time and GPS address. Stamp on arrival/departure and visit fields fill themselves.
create.stamp_empty: No stamps yet. Tap “Stamp location now” in the field.
settings.title: My settings
settings.sub: Work hours control smart routing. Language and vehicle defaults live here.
settings.lang_hint: Applied immediately and saved on this device.
settings.work_desc: During work hours: Quick stamp. After hours: log writing screen.
